entities.name: Direct Knowledge Ingest
entities.context: Command for direct ingestion of large documents into N5 knowledge reservoirs using conversational LLM processing

entities.name: N5
entities.context: Knowledge system framework that contains knowledge reservoirs for structured information storage

entities.name: LLM
entities.context: Large Language Model used for conversational processing of document content to extract structured knowledge

entities.name: knowledge reservoirs
entities.context: Destination storage systems within N5 for categorized extracted information

entities.name: Bio information
entities.context: Category of extracted personal/biographical data stored in knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: Timeline events
entities.context: Category of chronological event data extracted and stored in knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: Glossary terms
entities.context: Category of defined terminology extracted and stored in knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: Sources and references
entities.context: Category of citation and source data extracted and stored in knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: SPO triples
entities.context: Subject-Predicate-Object format for extracted facts stored in knowledge reservoirs

entities.name: Schema expansion suggestions
entities.context: Category of structural recommendations for extending the knowledge schema

entities.name: deep_research
entities.context: Alternative research method that Direct Knowledge Ingest bypasses for scalability

entities.name: run_direct_ingestion.py
entities.context: Python CLI script for executing direct knowledge ingestion from command line

entities.name: Zo
entities.context: Zo Computer system that provides the N5 integration and conversational processing capabilities

relationships.context: Processes document content through conversational LLM processing
Extracts structured knowledge into N5 knowledge reservoirs
Bypasses deep_research limitations for scalable knowledge extraction
Stores extracted facts in Subject-Predicate-Object format
Stores recommendations for extending knowledge schema
CLI implementation of the Direct Knowledge Ingest command
Provides N5 integration for direct knowledge ingestion via N5: command interface
